title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Streams Manifest Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating one row object from streams_manifest.csv in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, and does not validate any benchmark result.

stream_id.description: Unique stream identifier within the session.

sensor_type.description: Proxy modality or event-stream type represented by this stream.

device_model.description: Device or generator name. For public sample data, this should identify a synthetic/mock generator rather than a real participant device.

sampling_rate.description: Sampling rate in Hz. CSV readers may load this as a string; validators may coerce it later.

start_timestamp.description: Stream start timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format for the synthetic session.

end_timestamp.description: Stream end timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format for the synthetic session.

file_path.description: Relative path to the associated synthetic/sample stream file or placeholder path. This must not point to raw human data.

raw_or_processed.description: Whether the referenced stream is raw, processed, synthetic, or event-only.

packet_loss_estimate.description: Estimated packet loss. For synthetic streams this should normally be 0 or a synthetic placeholder.

notes.description: Boundary notes. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

raw_human_data_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public sample data this must be false.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For current proxy sample data this must be false.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public helper files this must be false.
